title: Manhattan Madness
writer: Charles T. Dazey, Frank Mitchell Dazey, E.V. Durling
actors: Jack Dempsey, Estelle Taylor, George Siegmann
plot: Steve O'Dare, a western rancher with little use for the effete East, is forced to go to New York on business and wires his club begging the crowd to provide him with a little action. On the train to Manhattan, Steve is attracted t...
